title: ReportingDashboard data.json
description: Schema for the single hand-edited data.json that drives the ReportingDashboard. Maps 1:1 to ReportingDashboard.Web.Models.DashboardData. See docs/data-schema.md for the annotated field-by-field reference.

$schema.description: Optional. Path to this schema for VS Code IntelliSense (e.g. "data.schema.json").

dateOnly.description: ISO-8601 calendar date (YYYY-MM-DD). Deserialized to System.DateOnly.

project.description: Top-band header content: title, subtitle, and the inline ADO backlog link.

title.description: Project display title, rendered at 24px/700 in the header. Required; non-empty.

subtitle.description: Muted subtitle under the title, conventionally "<Org> • <Workstream> • <Month Year>".

backlogUrl.description: Absolute http(s) URL for the "→ ADO Backlog" header link. Non-http(s) or unparseable URLs cause the link to render as inert text.

backlogLinkText.description: Override for the backlog link label. Defaults to "→ ADO Backlog".

timeline.description: Gantt-style milestone timeline model. Start/end define the x-axis domain; lanes are horizontal swim lanes.

start.description: Left edge of the timeline (inclusive). Must be strictly before "end".

end.description: Right edge of the timeline (inclusive). Must be strictly after "start".

lanes.description: Swim lanes rendered top-to-bottom in array order. 1..6 lanes.

id.description: Short lane identifier shown bold in the left label column (e.g. "M1"). Must be unique across lanes.

label.description: Human-readable lane label shown under the id (e.g. "Chatbot & MS Role").

color.description: Lane brand color used for the id text and the horizontal SVG track (e.g. "#0078D4").

milestones.description: Zero or more milestones rendered on this lane. May be empty.

date.description: Milestone date; must fall within [timeline.start, timeline.end].

type.description: Marker style: "checkpoint" = circle, "poc" = amber diamond, "prod" = green diamond.

label.description: Caption text rendered above/below the marker (e.g. "Mar 26 PoC").

captionPosition.description: Optional caption placement override. If null/omitted, the layout engine alternates placement to avoid overlaps.

heatmap.description: Monthly execution grid (4 rows x N month columns).

months.description: Column headers, typically abbreviated month names (e.g. ["Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr"]). v1 design expects exactly 4 entries.

currentMonthIndex.description: Zero-based index of the "current" column (gets the amber highlight). If null, auto-computed from DateTime.Today against the months[] abbreviations; -1 if no match.

maxItemsPerCell.description: Soft cap on items rendered per cell; excess items collapse into a single "+K more" entry. Defaults to 4.

rows.description: Exactly 4 rows. Render order is Shipped, InProgress, Carryover, Blockers (enforced by the layout engine; array order in JSON is not authoritative).

category.description: Row category. Drives row color palette and icon.

cells.description: One sub-array per month column; length should equal heatmap.months.length. Each inner array is the list of item strings for that (category, month) cell. Empty inner arrays render a muted "–" placeholder.

theme.description: Optional theming hook. Unused in v1; reserved for future re-skin.

font.description: Font-family override. Not applied in v1.
